channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Navigating Life with Low Literacy and Numeracy - New Results from the 2023 Survey of Adult Skills
item.description: Navigating Life with Low Literacy and Numeracy - New Results from the 2023 Survey of Adult Skills by Directorate for Education and Skills has an embargo on Wednesday 1 July 2026 at 9:00.

item.title: Test No. 322: Determination of the Solubility and Dissolution Rate of Nanomaterials for Environmental Fate Assessment
item.description: Test No. 322: Determination of the Solubility and Dissolution Rate of Nanomaterials for Environmental Fate Assessment by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.title: Test No. 494: Vitrigel-Eye Irritancy Test Method for Identifying Chemicals Not Requiring Classification and Labelling for Eye Irritation or Serious Eye Damage
item.description: Test No. 494: Vitrigel-Eye Irritancy Test Method for Identifying Chemicals Not Requiring Classification and Labelling for Eye Irritation or Serious Eye Damage by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.title: Test No. 127: Dustiness determination of materials containing nano-objects and their aggregates and agglomerates
item.description: Test No. 127: Dustiness determination of materials containing nano-objects and their aggregates and agglomerates by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.title: Essai n° 446A : Essai par gènes rapporteurs ToxTracker de caractérisation du danger de génotoxicité et des mécanismes d’action génotoxiques et non génotoxiques
item.description: Essai n° 446A : Essai par gènes rapporteurs ToxTracker de caractérisation du danger de génotoxicité et des mécanismes d’action génotoxiques et non génotoxiques by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Test No. 442D: In Vitro Skin Sensitisation - Assays addressing the Adverse Outcome Pathway Key Event on Keratinocyte activation by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Korea 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Test No. 498: In vitro Phototoxicity - Reconstructed Human Epidermis Phototoxicity test method by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.title: Test No. 446A: ToxTracker gene reporter assay for the identification of genotoxic hazard and genotoxic/non-genotoxic mechanism of action
item.description: Test No. 446A: ToxTracker gene reporter assay for the identification of genotoxic hazard and genotoxic/non-genotoxic mechanism of action by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Essai n° 429: Sensibilisation cutanée - Essai de stimulation locale des ganglions lymphatiques by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Test No. 442C: In Chemico Skin Sensitisation - Assays addressing the Adverse Outcome Pathway key event on covalent binding to proteins by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Essai n°498 : Phototoxicité in vitro - Essai sur épiderme humain reconstitué by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Policies for the Future of Farming and Food in Switzerland by Trade and Agriculture Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Essai n° 201: Algues d'eau douce et cyanobactéries, essai d'inhibition de la croissance by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Test No. 256: Determination of effects on earthworms (Oligochaeta, Annelida) in Field Studies by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.description: Test No. 445A: Determination of Cytochrome P450 (CYP) Induction using Differentiated Human Hepatic Cells by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 2 July 2026 at 8:00.
